#set heading(numbering: "1.")
#set math.equation(numbering: "(1)")

#align(center, text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics])
#align(center, [Source-backed grouped formula sample])

= Expressions

#text("Expression 1.") The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ 8 f_4^((8)) phi^i phi^j phi^k phi^l v^p [ delta^(s i) (theta gamma^(p m) theta) (theta gamma^(m j) theta) (theta gamma^(k n) theta) (theta gamma^(l n) theta) + delta^(s p) (theta gamma^(m i) theta) (theta gamma^(m j) theta) (theta gamma^(k n) theta) (theta gamma^(l n) theta) ] $

#text("Expression 2.") The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

#text("$K[H_n,1] = ( (m omega sqrt(xi xi_0)) / (i hbar sin(omega t)) ) ( (m omega sqrt(eta eta_0)) / (i hbar sin(omega t)) ) J_n ( (m omega sqrt(xi xi_0)) / (i hbar sin(omega t)) ) J_n ( (m omega sqrt(eta eta_0)) / (i hbar sin(omega t)) )$")

#text("Expression 3.") The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ E(beta) = E_0 + tilde(E)(beta) = 1/(2r) sum_(ell=1)^infinity ell^2 (ell^2 + mu_("eff")^2)^(1/2) + 1/r sum_(ell=1)^infinity (ell^2 (ell^2 + mu_("eff")^2)^(1/2)) / (e^(beta (ell^2 + mu_("eff")^2)^(1/2) / r) - 1) $

#text("Expression 4.") The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

#text("$G'(1/2 + 1/sqrt(2) - i beta, 1/2 - 1/sqrt(2) - i beta; (i z_0)/(hbar c)) / G(1/2 + 1/sqrt(2) - i beta, 1/2 - 1/sqrt(2) - i beta; (i z_0)/(hbar c)) = - i / (2 hbar c) - (1/2 + i beta) 1/z_0$")

#text("Expression 5.") The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

#text("$W = prod_(a=1)^(p-1) (n^(1/l) / L_a) integral_0^infinity (d s) / s (pi / (2 s))^((p-1)/2) e^(-r^2 s) (4 sinh^2(omega_l s sin(phi/2)) - sinh^2(2 omega_l s sin(phi/2))) / (cos(phi/2) sinh(2 omega_l s sin(phi/2)))$")
